name: A Turn in the Cave
description:
You stand in a turn inside the Cave. It's very dark but you note a passage
to west and another to the north. With a light you perceive that one of the
great number of pictures looks strange. If you touch the wall where it is
located you will see you are near a secret room.

exits.description: It's so dark to see to this direction.
It's too dark to see what have in this direction.
